title: Teltonika TSW030 8-port Ethernet Switch
description: The TSW030 is a cost-efficient unmanaged Ethernet switch, featuring eight 10/100 RJ45 ports and integrated DIN rail mounting . This compact and rugged 8-port switch includes a 2-pin power input and low power consumption of up to 0.5 W when idle and a maximum of up to 1.5 W . These make this plug-and-play switch perfect for industrial applications requiring to connect up to eight devices 8 LAN ports with speeds up to 100 Mbps Compact size DIN rail mounting option Plug and Play - No additional configuration needed Device QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
